notes: CYLNDR Cannes Lions 2026 BD Intelligence. 280 entries. Daily task overwrites this file.

entries.name: Carley Caldas
entries.title: SVP Marketing & Creative
entries.session: Creative Currency: From Insight to Impact
entries.venue: FQ Beach @ Cannes Lions (Female Quotient Equality Lounge)
entries.icpReason: eos Products is exactly the DTC challenger beauty brand profile CYLNDR targets; SVP Marketing is the right seniority tier.
entries.notes: Strongest fit entry. Speaking Mon Jun 22 at FQ Beach.

entries.name: Kelsey Newberry
entries.title: Vice President of Brand Marketing
entries.session: From Shelf Staple to Cultural Resonance
entries.icpReason: VP Brand Marketing is the exact ICP target title; eos is a DTC beauty/personal care challenger brand well under $500M.
entries.notes: Wed Jun 24 10:30 AM. Three eos contacts confirmed at Cannes 2026.

entries.name: Paige Grossman
entries.title: Vice President, Global Brand Creative
entries.icpReason: VP Global Brand Creative is exact ICP target title; Ancestry is a DTC consumer brand.
entries.notes: Confirm Ancestry revenue before outreach — Blackstone-owned, DNA market slowing.

entries.name: Sarah Leinberger
entries.title: Vice President of Marketing
entries.icpReason: VP Marketing title is exact ICP target; Yoobi is a DTC purpose-driven consumer brand at growth stage.
entries.notes: Strong fit — VP title exact match, DTC consumer brand profile.

entries.name: Yasmin O'Neal
entries.title: Global Brand Senior Director
entries.icpReason: DECIEM/The Ordinary is core ICP DTC beauty challenger; Senior Director fits ICP target seniority.
entries.notes: ELC parent acquired 2021 but brand operates independently.

entries.name: Lindsey Slaby
entries.title: Founder
entries.session: Agents, Signals, and the Self-Driving Funnel
entries.icpReason: PRIORITY: Sunday Dinner is an on-call strategic advisory to CMOs; key relationship per project instructions.
entries.notes: Wed Jun 24 3:40 PM Beach Stage. Outreach BEFORE festival — do not wait until Cannes.

entries.name: Nic Brandenberger
entries.title: Chief Marketing Officer
entries.venue: DEPT Secret Garden, 5 Rdpt Duboys d'Angers
entries.icpReason: Mammut is a private Swiss outdoor apparel challenger brand (~$150-250M revenue) — right category and company size; CMO above target title.
entries.notes: DEPT has Mammut as active client. Wed Jun 24 10:30 AM. Note DEPT relationship before outreach.

entries.title: Head of Western and Southern Europe, UK & Ireland
entries.session: You bought the AI. Where's the growth?

entries.icpReason: Klarna is a growth-stage fintech (post-IPO 2025); regional head role is useful access but not a marketing title.
entries.notes: DEPT Secret Garden Thu Jun 25. Second Klarna confirmed on the Croisette.

entries.title: Chief Executive Officer
entries.session: The human multiplier: why leadership is the real AI advantage

entries.icpReason: BLACKROLL is a challenger health/recovery brand — right consumer health category; CEO title is the friction.
entries.notes: DEPT Secret Garden Thu Jun 25 2:00 PM. Pursue VP/Director Marketing team members.

entries.title: Chief Marketing Officer
entries.icpReason: Savage X Fenty is a DTC fashion/lingerie challenger brand with cultural cachet; CMO above target title.
